title: Domain + application core with full todo use cases and unit tests
description: Implement Todo entity (identity, content, completion invariant per acceptance), domain errors as needed, repository port in application layer, and use cases: create, list, toggle complete, update text, delete. No SQLite, no Next imports. Provide unit tests achieving 100% line coverage on projects/todo-reference/src/domain/**/*.ts and projects/todo-reference/src/application/**/*.ts using in-memory or fake repository doubles only.
acceptance: Domain and application modules contain zero imports from react, next/*, or sqlite drivers.
Use cases cover create, list, toggle completion, update content, and delete with clear inputs/outputs (DTOs as needed).
Repository abstraction lives in application (or domain per brief) and is the only persistence boundary referenced by use cases.
Unit test suite achieves 100% line coverage on the declared domain and application globs per infra coverage config.
Edge cases for non-empty content or validation rules are covered by tests if required by MVP acceptance.
Empty list is treated as valid domain state (not an error) in list behavior.
